energy: high in the morning, flat by 4pm

workout.notes: 4 miles before 6am. Good. The morning is the best part.

work.focus: Q3 planning kickoff with the operations team
work.notes: Meeting went well. I ran it well. I could run it in my sleep, which is part of the problem I'm not fully admitting yet. Kevin from finance asked a question I'd already anticipated and I had the slide ready. Everyone was impressed. I was not. I don't know what I wanted instead.

kids.jake_reading: Tutor assessment scheduled for the 14th. Finally.
kids.emma: She wants to do robotics camp this summer. I said yes before Tom could answer. He noticed.
kids.notes: Tom pointed out at dinner that we haven't had a conversation about anything other than the kids and the house in a while. He said it nicely. He was right.

evening.notes: Opened the notes app at 9:30pm. There's an entry from 2022 that just says 'what would you do if the money was the same.' I don't remember writing it. I closed the app.
evening.work_email: Checked work email until 10:15. Did not need to.

at_risk: Saturday email boundary — failed again yesterday
notes: Tom's comment is sitting with me more than I expected. I don't know if it's a symptom of something or just the usual logistics crunch. I would like to know which one it is.
